title: Asenovgrad、Plovdiv — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Asenovgrad、Plovdivの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

AsenovgradはPlovdivにある人口50,590の都市です。A historic town near Plovdiv, known for the Asen’s Fortress, the Bachkovo Monastery, and its role as a center of Bulgarian Orthodox Christianity.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
